{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Gesha's resonance cannon (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Gesha's resonance cannon is made of [[Remnant]] parts and looks like black light bones with a [[dragon]] skull mouth.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
